description: The Particle System Metadata component gives running status numbers for a given ParticleSystem.

fields.System: the particle system to get data from.
fields.LastSimulationTime: The seconds needed to do the last simulation of ``System``.
fields.LastSubmissionTime: the seconds needed to do the last submission of data to the renderer for ``System``.
fields.RenderDataReallocationCount: The amount of reallocation needed for the render data for ``System``.
fields.TrailCount: The amount of current trails in ``System``.
fields.TrailCapacity: The trail capacity for trail point groups of the current trail buffer pool of ``System``.
fields.TrailPointCapacity: The trail capacity for trail points of the current trail buffer pool of ``System``.
fields.TrailsDataReallocationCount: The amount of reallocation needed for the render data for trails of ``System``.
